ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (e.g., league, knockout) */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tournament is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES tournament_organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week number of the match */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week of the match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the match */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "field" INTEGER /* ID of the field where the match is played */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "referee" INTEGER /* ID of the referee assigned to the match */,
  "assistant_referee" INTEGER /* ID of the assistant referee assigned to the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., home win, away win, draw) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Current status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee FOREIGN KEY ("referee") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_field FOREIGN KEY ("field") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_assistant_referee FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_referee") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, defender, goalkeeper) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the field */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match outcome */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the match (e.g., home, away, draw) */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., home win, away win, draw) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Current status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_outcomes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
